short_description: FORS menu item Analysis Lab not visible for IT Support role after view permissions update
description: Following a view permissions update performed by the superadmin on 2026-04-29, the Analysis Lab page (/lab) has disappeared from the sidebar navigation for all users with the it_support role. The view_permissions table entry for it_support was modified but the lab component toggle may have been accidentally disabled. Other roles (it_manager, it_report) can still see the menu. The issue affects 5 IT Support agents currently unable to trigger AI analysis on pending tickets. Tickets with status "Analysis Pending" are accumulating with no way for agents to process them.
